description: Trail session tracking and dashboard for VS Code
viewsContainer.title: Anytime Trail
config.daemon.useExternalDaemon: Use an externally-running trail-server daemon instead of starting one inside the extension. Requires `npx anytime-trail-server start` to be running first.
config.analyzeAll.enabled: Enable the AnalyzeAll pipeline (importAll + memory-core runOnce). When disabled (default), the Pipelines tree view is hidden and no automatic or manual runs are performed.
config.lep.stageOverride: Temporarily override the LEP stage from `lep.json` (`<workspace>/.anytime/trail/lep.json`). One of `disabled` / `sources` / `primary` / `memory` / `primary+memory` / `all`. Leave empty to use `lep.json`. Controls which Waves run (1=sources, 2=primary import, 3=memory). Reload Window to apply.
config.lep.configPath: Alternate path to `lep.json`. When set, only this file is read (the standard `.anytime/trail/lep.json` search is skipped). Reload Window to apply.
